metadata.name: Update a Social Services Case File

description: A social worker needs to add a note to a client's case file after a home visit.

nodes.task_description: Identify the correct client case file.

expected_outcome.expected: The social worker successfully pulls up the client's record.

nodes.task_description: Draft a case note summarizing the home visit, including observations and any new actions planned.

expected_outcome.expected: The social worker writes a clear, concise, and objective case note.

nodes.task_description: Save the note to the case file with the correct date and time.

expected_outcome.expected: The social worker successfully adds the note to the official case record.
